name: PlanKraft International

location.address: Masta Villa Plaza, Highpoint, Juja, Nairobi, Kenya

about: PlanKraft International is a multi-disciplinary firm focused on the built environment. Our core specialties include Architectural Design, Project Management, Model Making, Interior Design & Landscaping. We blend creativity with technical precision, delivering bespoke design solutions that are structurally sound and visually compelling.
philosophy: We create functional, sustainable, and contextual built environments, combining local craft with cutting-edge technology. We operate to international standards and collaborate with global partners.
professional_standing: Registered with the Board of Registration of Architects and Quantity Surveyors of Kenya (BORAQS).

portfolio.highlight: African Union IBAR Campus: Modern complex with sleek grey facades and vertical louvers.
Two-story white modular/container buildings along a paved walkway.
LITTLE RED: High-end storefront with luxury apparel and warm lighting.
Contemporary multi-story townhouses with geometric rooflines and mixed finishes.
icolo.io: Reception with organic-shaped white desk and woven wooden ceiling.
Aerial 3D rendering of a large-scale campus or residential development in a wooded area.

news.title: Architects Declare
news.description: Grasp Design Ltd initiated the Kenyan chapter of Architects Declare, joining a global movement for climate and biodiversity action in the built environment.
